sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَخِي تَعَلُّمَ الْبَرْمَجَةِ فِي الْعَامِ الْمَاضِي.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je prošle godine odlučio naučiti programiranje.
sentences.translationEn: My brother decided to learn programming last year.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَكْتُبُ الْأَكْوَادَ لِإِنْشَاءِ تَطْبِيقَاتِ هَاتِفٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: On piše kodove za kreiranje novih mobilnih aplikacija.
sentences.translationEn: He writes codes to create new mobile applications.

sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ مَهَارَةٌ مُفِيدَةٌ فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je korisna vještina na modernom tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is a useful skill in the modern job market.

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يَقْضِي سَاعَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً فِي التَّدَرُّبِ عَلَى حَاسُوبِهِ.
sentences.translation: On provodi mnogo sati vježbajući na svom računaru.
sentences.translationEn: He spends many hours practicing on his computer.
